channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: France Confines 1,700 On Cruise Ship After Suspected Norovirus Death

media:content.media:description: Norovirus is a form of gastroenteritis, which causes vomiting and diarrhoea and is highly contagious.

item.description: French authorities on Wednesday confined more than 1,700 passengers and crew on a cruise ship docked in Bordeaux after a passenger died from a suspected norovirus, officials said.
item.content:encoded: French authorities on Wednesday confined more than 1,700 passengers and crew on a cruise ship docked in Bordeaux after a passenger died from a suspected norovirus, officials said.

item.title: NDTV Exclusive: How Mediator Pakistan Has Been Harbouring Iranian Military Jets For Years

media:content.media:description: Pakistan likely allowed Iran to position its only Boeing 747-based aerial tanker in Pakistan

item.description: In a statement, the government of Pakistan, while not denying the presence of the aircraft, has stated that it 'categorically rejects the CBS News report regarding the presence of Iranian aircraft at Nur Khan Air Base as misleading and sensationalise
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1098688/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>In a statement, the government of Pakistan, while not denying the presence of the aircraft, has stated that it 'categorically rejects the CBS News report regarding the presence of Iranian aircraft at Nur Khan Air Base as misleading and sensationalise

item.title: China Draws Four 'Red-Lines' In Ties With US Ahead Of Trump-Xi Summit

media:content.media:description: Trump is on his way to Beijing to meet with China's President Xi Jinping.

item.description: China views the democratically governed Taiwan as its own territory. Therefore, the United States' weapons sales to Taipei is certain to be discussed during the two days of meetings this week between Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping.
item.content:encoded: China views the democratically governed Taiwan as its own territory. Therefore, the United States' weapons sales to Taipei is certain to be discussed during the two days of meetings this week between Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | The Great Gulf Divorce: The UAE Has Broken From The Arab Order - But For What, Really?
item.description: For half a century, the UAE survived by balancing Arabia, America and Iran. Now MBZ has chosen a side.
item.content:encoded: For half a century, the UAE survived by balancing Arabia, America and Iran. Now MBZ has chosen a side.

item.title: Trump China Visit Live Updates: Trump Wants Xi To 'Open Up' China At Superpower Summit

media:content.media:description: Trump China Visit Live: Trade ties between Beijing and Washington have been fraught in recent years

item.description: Donald Trump's 2-Day China Visit Live Update: During the trip, US arms sales to Taiwan, China's controls on rare-earth exports, and the countries' raucous trade relationships are among the main issues expected to be taken up by Trump and Xi.
item.content:encoded: Donald Trump's 2-Day China Visit Live Update: During the trip, US arms sales to Taiwan, China's controls on rare-earth exports, and the countries' raucous trade relationships are among the main issues expected to be taken up by Trump and Xi.

item.title: Pakistan Closer To 'Islamic NATO'? Khawaja Asif Says Turkey, Qatar To Join Saudi Pact

media:content.media:description: Islamabad and Riyadh signed the Strategic Mutual Defence Agreement in 2025

item.description: The two new inclusions would potentially create a new axis that blends Ankara's military experience and defence manufacturing base, Islamabad's nuclear deterrent and ballistic missile capability, and Saudi Arabia and Qatar's financial muscle.
item.content:encoded: The two new inclusions would potentially create a new axis that blends Ankara's military experience and defence manufacturing base, Islamabad's nuclear deterrent and ballistic missile capability, and Saudi Arabia and Qatar's financial muscle.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | The Beijing Visit: Why Does Trump Suddenly Need Xi Jinping?
item.description: China will factor in the real possibility that in the mid-term elections in November, Trump may lose the House of Representatives and may become a lame-duck president. How far should it invest in an agreement with Trump is the question.
item.content:encoded: China will factor in the real possibility that in the mid-term elections in November, Trump may lose the House of Representatives and may become a lame-duck president. How far should it invest in an agreement with Trump is the question.

item.title: Last-Minute Call Brings Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang Into Trump's China Trip

media:content.media:description: CEOs accompanying Trump are mainly from firms seeking to resolve business issues with China

item.description: US President Donald Trump asked Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang at the last minute to join the trip, said a source familiar with the matter who spoke on condition of anonymity.
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump asked Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang at the last minute to join the trip, said a source familiar with the matter who spoke on condition of anonymity.

item.title: Hantavirus Outbreak: Britain To Isolate 10 People As Precaution
item.description: British health authorities said on Tuesday that 10 people from remote British island territories who were contacts of individuals in the hantavirus outbreak will be brought
item.content:encoded: British health authorities said on Tuesday that 10 people from remote British island territories who were contacts of individuals in the hantavirus outbreak will be brought

item.title: How Google Is Moving The Needle On AI, Tony Stark-Style

media:content.media:description: Google's AI pointer hints at a future of ambient, gesture-driven computing

item.description: Google DeepMind's new AI-powered pointer may change how humans interact with computers altogether.
item.content:encoded: Google DeepMind's new AI-powered pointer may change how humans interact with computers altogether.

item.title: $29 Billion In 60 Days: Iran War Cost 16% More Than US Estimate

media:content.media:description: Democrats and other critics of the war have questioned the Pentagon's calculations

item.description: The figure, revealed during a budget hearing on Capitol Hill, is about $4 billion higher than the department's previous estimate given two weeks ago.
item.content:encoded: The figure, revealed during a budget hearing on Capitol Hill, is about $4 billion higher than the department's previous estimate given two weeks ago.

item.title: Hantavirus Outbreak: French Patient In Critical Care As Cases Grow To 11
item.description: A French woman infected in the deadly hantavirus outbreak on a cruise ship is critically ill and being treated with an artificial lung, a doctor at the Paris hospital caring for the sickened passenger.
item.content:encoded: A French woman infected in the deadly hantavirus outbreak on a cruise ship is critically ill and being treated with an artificial lung, a doctor at the Paris hospital caring for the sickened passenger.

item.title: Saudi Arabia Launched Covert Attacks On Iran Amid Middle East War: Report

media:content.media:description: Saudi Arabia's strikes followed weeks of mounting tension.

item.description: The Saudi attacks, not previously reported, mark the first time that the kingdom is known to have directly carried out military action on Iranian soil and show it is becoming much bolder in defending itself against its main regional rival.
item.content:encoded: The Saudi attacks, not previously reported, mark the first time that the kingdom is known to have directly carried out military action on Iranian soil and show it is becoming much bolder in defending itself against its main regional rival.

item.title: Hantavirus Outbreak: Cruise Ship Passenger Adjusts To Quarantine In US
item.description: When Jake Rosmarin boarded the MV Hondius, he gleefully posted on social media that the ship would be his home for 35 days as he traveled across the South Atlantic.
item.content:encoded: When Jake Rosmarin boarded the MV Hondius, he gleefully posted on social media that the ship would be his home for 35 days as he traveled across the South Atlantic.

item.title: Kash Patel Denies Allegations of Drinking During Senate Budget Hearing

media:content.media:description: The testy exchange occurred at an annual Senate subcommittee budget hearing featuring Kash Patel

item.description: Patel has filed a $250 million lawsuit over the story. The Atlantic has said it stands by its reporting and would vigorously defend against the "meritless lawsuit."
item.content:encoded: Patel has filed a $250 million lawsuit over the story. The Atlantic has said it stands by its reporting and would vigorously defend against the "meritless lawsuit."

item.title: Trump Downplays Differences With Xi Over Iran Ahead Of Beijing Summit

media:content.media:description: China has long supported Iran's ballistic missile programme

item.description: Trump has been unsuccessfully pressing Xi to use China's considerable leverage to prod Iran to agree to US terms to end the more than 2-month-old war - or, at the very least, reopen the Strait of Hormuz.
item.content:encoded: Trump has been unsuccessfully pressing Xi to use China's considerable leverage to prod Iran to agree to US terms to end the more than 2-month-old war - or, at the very least, reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: US Appeals Court Pauses Ruling Against Trump's 10% Global Tariffs

media:content.media:description: US Court of International Trade blocked tariffs from being implemented against two firms and Washington

item.description: Trump imposed the temporary 10-percent duty in February, shortly after the Supreme Court struck down many of his global tariffs.
item.content:encoded: Trump imposed the temporary 10-percent duty in February, shortly after the Supreme Court struck down many of his global tariffs.

item.title: Russia Tests Nuclear-Capable 'Satan II' Missile With 35,000 km Range

media:content.media:description: The Sarmat - designated "Satan II" is meant to replace 40 Soviet-built Voyevoda missiles

item.description: Putin said Sarmat is capable of suborbital flight, giving it a range of more than 35,000 kilometers (21,700 miles) and an extended capability to penetrate any prospective missile defenses.
item.content:encoded: Putin said Sarmat is capable of suborbital flight, giving it a range of more than 35,000 kilometers (21,700 miles) and an extended capability to penetrate any prospective missile defenses.

item.title: Exclusive: Satellite Image Confirms Pak May Be Shielding Iran's Military Aircraft

media:content.media:description: Iranian aircraft parked at Pakistan's Nur Khan airbase High-res here

item.description: Iran sent multiple aircraft including a reconnaissance and intelligence plane to Pakistan's Nur Khan airbase soon after US President Donald Trump announced the ceasefire in April, CBS News reported
item.content:encoded: Iran sent multiple aircraft including a reconnaissance and intelligence plane to Pakistan's Nur Khan airbase soon after US President Donald Trump announced the ceasefire in April, CBS News reported

item.title: Trump Heads To China For High-Stakes Talks With Xi On Tehran, Taiwan And Trade

media:content.media:description: Trump postponed his China visit on one occasion because of the Iran war

item.description: When the leaders of the globe's two economic powerhouses meet, they are set to tackle a loaded agenda, from US arms transfers to Taiwan, Beijing's rare earth export restrictions, the situation in Iran, to the state of bilateral trade relations.
item.content:encoded: When the leaders of the globe's two economic powerhouses meet, they are set to tackle a loaded agenda, from US arms transfers to Taiwan, Beijing's rare earth export restrictions, the situation in Iran, to the state of bilateral trade relations.
